sections.paragraph:
Arab. سبل almost i.q. Hebr. יָבַל, a root not used as a verb.-

(1) to go, whence שְׁבִיל way.

(2) to go up, to grow (Arab. Conj. IV. and quadril. سَنْبَلَ to produce ears of corn). See שִׁבֶּלֶת , שִׁבֹּלֶת No. 2 .

(3) to flow, especially plentifully. Arabic Conj. IV. Hence سَبَلُ showers. Compare שֹׁבֶל, שִׁבֹּלֶת. There is a similar connection of significations in the verbs הָלַךְ, יָרַד, עָלָה.

Derivatives, see No. 1, 2, 3.
